item.title: How to remap keys
item.description: Keyboard remapping There are many programs out there for X. But want to do it better way with systemd. Get keyboard info cat /proc/bus/input/devices I: Bus=0011 Vendor=0001 Product=0001 Version=ab54 N: Name="AT Translated Set 2 keyboard" P: Phys=isa0060/serio0/input0 S: Sysfs=/devices/platform/i8042/serio0/input/input0 U: Uniq= H: Handlers=sysrq kbd leds event0 B: PROP=0 B: EV=120013 B: KEY=402000000 3803078f800d001 fefff79fffefffff fffffffffffffffe B: MSC=10 B: LED=7 And check the keyboard info… You will need handlers line.
